location: A 4% random drop from Fire Knights who wield a greatsword (as opposed to the shortsword-carrying variant) on the upper levels of Shadow Keep, reached via the Storehouse/Church District. The most reliable target is the Fire Knight stationed right before the elevator up to the Storehouse, First Floor site of grace — it starts with its back turned, so it's a free backstab plus an easy grace-reset loop.
tactics: Only the greatsword-carrying Fire Knights drop this weapon — the shortsword-wielding ones on the lower floors carry something else, so double-check which one you're farming
Fastest loop: rest at Storehouse, First Floor grace, take the elevator down, backstab the Fire Knight waiting there (its back is turned), then reset at the grace and repeat

Alternate route: from Main Gate Plaza grace (after the Golden Hippo fight), take the stairs opposite the Fire Knight and open the shortcut door back toward the boss arena — hug the left wall to avoid pulling the nearby Shadow Militiamen
Equip an Item Discovery talisman (e.g. Silver Scarab) to speed up the ~4% drop rate
lore: A long, wave-shaped blade issued to the Fire Knights of the Shadow Realm and consecrated with a flame incantation, so that every strike burns as much as it cuts.

builds.name: Quality/Faith fire hybrid
builds.why: D/D/D scaling across Strength, Dexterity, and Faith with room to infuse — the weapon carries innate fire damage even before an affinity change

builds.name: Flame Art faith build
builds.why: Flame Art affinity dumps most of the scaling into Faith, pushing roughly 70% of its damage into fire and turning it into a near-incantation-grade colossal sword
